author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-neighbors audit complete. 9 of 13 sklearn neighbors estimators present (KNeighborsClassifier, KNeighborsRegressor, RadiusNeighborsClassifier, RadiusNeighborsRegressor, NearestNeighbors, NearestCentroid, LocalOutlierFactor, KdTree, BallTree).

Sub-issues closed:
- #261 predict_proba on classifiers
- #262 score() on every estimator (mean accuracy / R²)
- #263 kneighbors() / radius_neighbors() methods on supervised estimators
- #264 kneighbors_graph + radius_neighbors_graph + sort_graph_by_row_values (free fns + methods)
- #265 LocalOutlierFactor full sklearn API (decision_function, fit_predict, score_samples, novelty)
- #266 proof-of-API integration test

Deferred to existing issues (will be addressed in their own audit pass):
- #60 KNeighborsTransformer + RadiusNeighborsTransformer (missing estimators)
- #63 NeighborhoodComponentsAnalysis (missing estimator)
- #64 KernelDensity (missing estimator)
- #66 sparse data support
- #67 precomputed distance matrix
- #148 DistanceMetric class

ferrolearn-extras over sklearn:
- BallTree implementation always available alongside KdTree (sklearn picks one)
- LOF predict() supports both training data and new data without strict novelty mode separation

Verification: 160 tests pass (131 unit + 10 api_proof + 2 oracle + 3 proptest + 2 sklearn_equiv + 12 doctest). Zero regressions.
